Sources.Title: Sean Callahan — Blueprint Advanced Panel Labcorp report
Sean Callahan — My Blueprint Advanced Panel Results

TranscriptionNotes: Sean Callahan's first-person results article links the original report and describes it as his own Blueprint Advanced Panel bloodwork.
The Labcorp report names Sean Callahan, states age 45, and assigns the complete blood count, comprehensive metabolic panel, and cardiac CRP to the 20 January 2025 collection.
The source redacts the date of birth, so AgeYears preserves the report's published age without inferring or republishing a birthday.
Albumin was converted from g/dL to g/L by multiplying by 10.
Creatinine was converted from mg/dL to µmol/L by multiplying by 88.4.
Glucose was converted from mg/dL to mmol/L by multiplying by 0.0555.
